devStore.title: Developer Hub
devStore.subtitle: Apps, themes, analytics & APIs
devStore.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this app?
devStore.commissionInfoDesc: ImuChat takes a 15% commission on app and theme sales.
devStore.keyCreatedMsg: Your key has been created. Save it now, it won't be shown again.
devStore.noKeysSub: Create a key to access the developer API.
devStore.doc_gettingStartedContent: Welcome! Create a creator profile, submit your first app or theme, and follow the review process to get published on the store.
devStore.doc_apiReferenceContent: The developer API lets you manage your submissions, themes and analytics programmatically. Generate an API key from the API Keys section.
devStore.doc_submissionGuideContent:
1. Create a draft
2. Fill in the required information
3. Submit for review
4. Wait for approval (1-3 business days)
5. Auto-publish after approval.
devStore.doc_themeGuideContent: Use the theme editor to customize colors, typography, and border radii. Preview in real-time before publishing.
devStore.doc_permissionsContent: Apps can request various permissions: camera, microphone, storage, location, contacts, notifications. Users must accept them.
devStore.doc_monetizationContent: Set a price for your apps or themes. ImuChat takes a 15% commission. Payouts are made monthly after KYC verification.
devStore.doc_bestPracticesContent: Optimize performance, follow design guidelines, provide clear descriptions, and respond to user reviews.
devStore.doc_faqContent:
Q: How long does the review take?
A: 1 to 3 business days.

Q: Can I update a published app?
A: Yes, publish a new version.

Q: How to contact support?
A: From settings > Support.
